summary: Verified the /sitemap.xml blank-page bug fix end-to-end. All 5 acceptance criteria PASS: (1) /sitemap.xml returns HTTP 200 application/xml with valid <urlset> (91 URLs, includes <?xml-stylesheet href=/assets/sitemap.xsl?>). (2) /assets/sitemap.xsl now returns HTTP 200 text/xsl; charset=UTF-8 (was 502 before — root cause confirmed fixed via router.php static-asset handler). (3) Loading /sitemap.xml in headless Chromium successfully runs the XSL transform and renders a human-readable table — heading 'XML Sitemap', '91 URLs' badge, columns # / URL / Last Modified / Frequency / Priority, 92 table rows (1 header + 91 data) — NOT blank. (4) /sitemap.php contains the prominent data-testid='sitemap-xml-callout' div with data-testid='sitemap-xml-link' button (text 'View XML Sitemap', href='/sitemap.xml', visible). (5) Admin login with admin@maventechsoftware.com works; on admin.php?tab=ai-blogger the data-testid='view-sitemap-btn' is present with href=<site_url>/sitemap.xml and target=_blank. Bug is fully resolved.
critical_code_review_comments: Browser console warns: 'XSLTProcessor and XSLT Processing Instructions have been deprecated by all browsers' (Chrome deprecation, slated removal). Current rendering works in all current browsers but team should track chromestatus.com/feature/4709671889534976 and plan a server-side XSL→HTML fallback (e.g. ?format=html) before the deprecation lands. Not blocking now.

view-sitemap-btn on the ai-blogger admin tab was technically not 'visible' to Playwright in the default 1920x1080 viewport (it sits below the fold inside a scrollable section) — clicking required scrolling. Not a bug; flagging only because it can confuse future automated clicks.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for blank /sitemap.xml verified. router.php now serves .xsl with Content-Type text/xsl (no longer 502). Browser XSL transform renders the human-readable table at /sitemap.xml. /sitemap.php has a prominent 'View XML Sitemap' callout (data-testid sitemap-xml-callout / sitemap-xml-link). Admin 'View Sitemap' button (data-testid view-sitemap-btn) lives on admin.php?tab=ai-blogger and links to /sitemap.xml. No regressions found.
rca of the issue: Root cause (already fixed by E1): preview router was letting PHP's built-in server handle /assets/sitemap.xsl, but that path hit Cloudflare's strict Host-header path and returned 502. Browser fetched /sitemap.xml fine but the referenced XSL stylesheet failed → XSLT transform aborted → blank page. Fix: router.php static-asset handler now explicitly serves .xsl with Content-Type text/xsl; charset=UTF-8 (also added to long-cache + gzip lists). Verified: curl /assets/sitemap.xsl → 200 text/xsl (5039 bytes); Chromium successfully transforms and renders the table.
